items.caption: A black jacket with a camouflage pattern, laid out flat on a surface. the jacket features a prominent logo on the left chest area, which reads "the north face" in white capital letters, followed by "x mastermind" in smaller white text. the jacket appears to be a collaboration between the north face and mastermind, a fashion brand known for its streetwear-inspired designs. the jacket is designed with a hood and a zipper running down the front. on the right side of the jacket, there is a tag with handwritten text, but the contents of the text are not clear. the background is neutral and does not distract from the jacket.
